figures.caption: TABLE I. List of invariant polynomial terms under the discrete rotation by angle 2π 5 and reflection, up to the total degree 10. The left column shows the raw outputs of the algorithm, while the right column expresses them as linear combinations of the natural basis fk,l defined in Eq. (19).
TABLE III. KPZ invariant terms with λ = 1 under rotation, reflection, shift, and statistical-tilt symmetries, up to fifth order in fields and fourth order in derivatives.

TABLE II. List of Toner–Tu covariant terms with v under rotation and reflection symmetries, up to third order in fields and second order in derivatives. The first group contains terms appearing in Eq. (20). while the second group lists symmetry-allowed terms not present in Eq. (20).
